reviews.text: staying in conrad has left me a sweet memory.the friendly service with a warm smile has made our stay more comfortable.time ran so fast without realizing three days just gone like that.suddenly we realized, our stay was too short, and we promise ourselves we will come back to conrad again on our next vacation. the hotel is just great to our opinion!

reviews.title: Bad hotel management and unacceptable room cleanne
reviews.text: during 4 days and 3 nights I stayed at Conrad Bali, i transferred to 3 different rooms. I first sufferred over 30 bedbugs over night on my first night there, transferred to a second room, woken up with no AC in the morning and with no phones to report because they were broken. Finally transferred to the third room, our phones have been broken again, we were unreachable by outside guests through phone. Conrad Bali's clinic doctor is extreamly professional and the I would  not personally accept her medical advices. The management had treated my bedbugs situation very lightly and even until the condition continued to worsen, management still decided to treat it lightly and avoid any meeting with the guests. It is quite a kids friendly resort but due to the room cleanness, i strongly urge guests with kids to not stay there should bedbugs situation reoccure again. Conditions as such can be worser for young kids and babies. I was more than happy to leave after it's my last day with the hotel.
reviews.positives: Kids friendly resort

reviews.title: Nightmare and over rated hotel
reviews.positives: None. My worst expeience in Bali

reviews.title: Will not come back.
reviews.text:
Spent 2 nights here, I had a rather bad or unlucky experience here. I came here to get a quiet, and peaceful resort experience. Certainly didn’t get that and certainly will not come back.

- This is a big hotel, after check in, nobody even showed me to my room. I was given room keys, and i had to ask around how to get there.

- Room: the room has this pretty colorful rug around the bed, i stepped on it, my feet suddenly got all sticky. I guess the housekeeping doesnt even vacuum the rug or clean it whatsoever

- Cleaning: the next day, i went down to the pool obviously expecting the room to be cleaned when I’m gone. I came back to an uncleaned room. Texted receptionist through Whatsapp (because they won’t answer your call from the phone in your room), it took 2 complains and 2 different people to answer (each time you ask through Whatsapp, different people answer your question) and well over an hour for them to come. I don’t see them bringing anything to clean the rug with. Even after being requested to clean the rug, its still sticky.

- Customer Service:
They only answer through Whatsapp, doesn’t pick up phone calls through room phone. Those phones are only used for them to call you. I find this quite annoying. 
Problem was: i came back to my room seeing it still uncleaned, i bought food from outside i was hungry, i wanted plates & cutleries and i want mineral waters. So i went and ask them through whatsapp for 1. Plates and cutleries 2. Mineral waters 3. Housekeeping to clean room. I think the customer service can only process one thing at a time as i had to keep asking and asking and asking. 
- It took 40 mins for the plates to arrive
- Asked the guy who brought the plate to bring mineral water - took around 50 mins to get it
- cleaning service took well over an hour to come. Just after i finished my meals.

- The Room Sensors! (WORST THING EVER!!!)
They have this sensor, so when the door opens, the aircon shut down and when theres no movement in the room aircon
reviews.response:
Dear Elisa,
I am terribly sorry your experience with us occurred as you described. Clearly these incidents are not to our standard and we must review and take quick action to rectify with our team on all  aspects that you have raised.  Please accept our sincere apologies that your stay did not go as we have anticipated for you and that we hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Bad

Supposed concert hotel is level up from Hilton, but we don’t think so.

reviews.title: Its just 'ok' hotel, nothing special. The room is outdated. Not 5 stars hotel

Room is outdated which is fine if maintained properly but they are not. Food is expensive. We continued our stay at The Laguna Nusa Dua. Much different experience. I would go back to the Laguna but not at Conrad. The guests were loud screaming still after past 12 midnight (maybe drunk). We told the front desk at checkedout. No apologies were offered, but excuses. They told 'oh we have wedding last night and usually are loud'. Just like that. It just 'ok' hotel. Quite dissapointed and didnt meet my expectation and def not lived up to the name.  Nothing special and prefer elsewhere. The management need to learn from the Laguna Nusa Dua.

Conrad Bali has definitely passed its glory days, the hilton group should pay more attention and spend more fund renovating this hotel.  Totally not worth your money. Please look elsewhere. reviews.title: Nice beachfront, but high cost unjustified.
reviews.text: Nothing to write home about. Rooms average for area, breakfast not included at 250 usd/night. Similar quality hotels can be had for 100 usd less in same area.
reviews.positives: Beachfront with sandy pool great.

reviews.title: Pretentious and just not worth the money
reviews.text:
The location is as pretentious and boring as the hotel.
One of the 3 in-house restos was closed for renovation. The other two offer little value for extortionally high prices.
The rooms are standard (nothing that would blow you out of the water). The view from the (standard) rooms is virtually non-existent (don't know about the higher category rooms).
The place is pretty empty (as to be expected) and the few guests looked just as bored as I was. Only redeeming feature are the water sport rental huts just in front of the hotel beach. Yet again, that fun could have been had for a lot less money.

reviews.title: Honestly not so value for money
reviews.text:
Old hotel, nothing impressive. Some of their staff was trying their best but with the price that I paid, we really weren't impressed at all. The room, I believed was renovated and not too bad but you can imagine the hotel age by looking at their old fashioned shower head. Tv resolution really need a redo, cannot even see the name of the hotel on the tv clearly, you can just imagine. 

The beach is so disappointing. Its the worst I can imagine for Nusa Dua. We went out to Nusa Dua Beach and Pantai Mengiat and they are both so much better. The beachfront is not enjoyable by the kids, and it's looks like a coarse sandy field rather than a beach . Left with no choice we went there to play sand and the guard said the beach is unsafe and asked us to wear slippers . I immediately brought my kids back to the hotel. The hotel is located at the upper North of Nusa Dua and very misleading to named it a Nusa Dua Hotel.  

Breakfast was so so, and one morning we actually need to que to go in. 5-star? No no. I felt we can get a better hotel in my home country and we don't need to travel to Bali for this kind of quality and experience.

Honestly, if they are charging half the price maybe still a hotel choice for some. For me, even if it's a half pice we would not want to stay in, we travelled to Bali for an exotic experience. It's our 2nd hotel in Bali and our 1st hotel was so much better in all aspects.
reviews.response:
Dear Jerry,
Please accept our apologies your recent stay did not meet with your expectations.  
To be clear the resort is indeed located in Nusa Dua, not to be confused with the ITDC complex.  I am sorry you felt the beach which is to be cleaned twice a day did not meet with your expectations; water shoes are now available to assist in preventing any issues with sea urchins or similar sea life while allowing guests to discover and enjoy the natural beauty of the beach and all it has to offer on low tide.
We are sorry you felt in the end you could have stayed at home and will be following up with our team to ensure we connect with all guests to ensure a personalized, genuine stay experience in the future.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Disappointing. Severely needs upgrading
reviews.text: Disappointing. Probably the worst experience in a 5 star hotel in Bali. The hotel tries to market itself as luxury, but lacks the quality to be such. The rooms were old and run down. There was a cockroach in the room when we woke up. The breakfast offering was so-so. The snacks and fruits ordered from the pool were sub-par. The upside is the pool, which is suitable for families. The service was fine, and tried to help make us feel better given our poor experience hence adding a star.
reviews.response:
Dear Johnny Chen,
Please accept our most sincere apologies that we fell so short in terms of service and experience during your recent stay. Trust that your comments have tremendous impact and that we are actioning immediately with our team to rectify accordingly. We hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back to enjoy as so many others have when you are next in Bali; I am confident we can make it right.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Under my expectation for 5 star hotel
reviews.text:
Conrad
This is my first time to Conrad. But sadly it’s under my expectation.
First, I arrive at 14:50 and have to wait another 10minutes because the check in time is at 15:00. But after 15:00, I only got 1 room readt but not for the another room. We insist that the two room has to be ready. But the Reseptionist seems confused and go inside the backdoor and I wait for almost 15minutes but the room still not ready. No welcome drink serve until we asked.
After struggling wait, the 2nd room ready on about 16:15. But once again, we are sad. The pillow sheet is smelly, as if it is not change after use of previous guest or some kind of musty smell. The smells is strong so that wes cannot sleep. We try to spray it with our sanitizer but the smell stayed. So I have to cover the pillow with clean towels. The bedsheet also have stain. Some of bath amenities is dusty as if never replaced when it is not used by previous guest. And when we ask for ice cube, it took us asking for more than three times for it to arrived.
The corridor has no direction sign, at day one we always get lost to lobby or to pool or back to our room.
1st night, we found a cat eating on our plate outside. And the 2nd night we found that cat urinate in front of our room and took almost 1 hour for housekeeping to clean it up.
The housekeeping is also weird. The 2nd day wes asked for cleaning, they only refilled the tissue for 10 sheet only. I do not know why. Just few grab, the tissue box is empty again. I am lazy to call for extra tissue because it is almost 9pm. Wondering I have to wait another 1 hour just to get extra tissue.
The breakfast do have a variety food but almost all tasteless, so different with the room service food we ordered.
For the 5star hotel as Conrad, really dissapoint me. This is the first time ever we stay at 5star hotel and the bed sheet is so smelly. Conrad really need to fix it.
reviews.response:
Dear Ibu Yuliani,
We are terribly troubled by your first stay experience with us and deeply apologize that you encountered such issues during your stay. Though we were extremely busy on the day you arrived with almost 100% occupancy on both nights, our team was taking the requisite time to prepare your room according to our stringent Hilton CleanStay protocols.  We assure you the linens were fully changed yet apologize you found them not to your expectation; please be sure to reach out to us on future issues so that we are able to remedy them quickly for you so you may fully enjoy your stay to your personal expectations.  Our ability to respond to our guests' individual needs is what continues to set Conrad Bali apart and why many of our guests are multi-repeating, loyal guests of ours.
Clearly we have disappointed you and again offer sincere apologies.  We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to "try us again for the first time" and make for a positive stay. Best, Kevin

reviews.title: Major reno going on!
reviews.text: We were utterly disappointed that the place was under reno and we were not informed of it. Main pool and a big part of compound cordoned off. Though beach wasn't affected we were not impressed. but we would still like to thank and shout out to Mr Christ for his patience and helpfulness and willingness to problem solve tho nothing would work for us as we booked Conrad for their facilities. We asked for a refund and checked out to another hotel the next day!
reviews.response:
Dear Tien,

Thank you for your review. We are committed to deliver smart luxury experiences that are synonymous to the Conrad brand, hence, we are in the process of upgrading our guest rooms and facilities. The refurbishment information had been shared with our partners and guests in advance, as well as on our website. Please accept our apologies if the information did not reached you well. Thank you indeed for your positive feedback about services extended by our team member ‘Christ”, I will definitely pass on your praises to him.

Once again, thank you for your feedback and hope to have an opportunity to welcome you again especially once the resort has gone through rejuvenation, early September this year. 

With regards,
Andreas Justkowiak
General Manager

reviews.title: Supposed to be good hotel , but poor services
reviews.text: I thought Conrad supposed to be my place to stay for vacation, but when we arrived at the hotel we were asked by the staff for the passport, ID etc, and told to wait for the room till 3 PM (it was 9am) then we go for a walk around and having lunch, then we went back to the hotel by 3.30PM and the staff asked us about the same question like before, and the room still hasn't ready yet, and the staff was not nice at all, he was not acting professional..such a pity a big hotel like Conrad downgraded because of the impolite staff..and we we were so disappointed and moved to Westin Nusa Dua, we didn't check out from the Conradm we just left it, id rather loose money than i have to stay at that hotel, as result we enjoyed our vacation at Westin
reviews.positives: The staff of the hotel wasn't nice to the Guest

reviews.title: Western style resort but little Balinese content
reviews.text: we sampled 3 hotels on our trip to bali; a traditional old world balinese seaside resort, a spa-like gem located in the middle of delightful rice paddies and the conrad. you cannot fault the facilities at the conrad but there is not a shred of balinese design sense on the grounds; one could have been in las vegas or miami.  several negatives compounded to spoil our stay.  we arrived 10 minutes before 6 pm and our room was not ready.  a 15 minute wait at that hour is not accepable.  no hand towels or face clothes in the room. evenings in the open air restaurants are a mass of mosquitos with not much anticipation of such invasions by the waitstaff.  once we started swatting and complained then repellant was offered and mousy coils were deployed.  that and exessive price gouging at the restaurants left a bad taste in our thankfully bite free mouths.  staff are decked out in tee shirts and look like they are on holidays--not the prime and proper balinese designed outfits that other resorts opt for.  summary: good western style resort for sitting near the pool but little authentic balinese experience other than the ubiquitous native dancers.
reviews.positives: Relaxing atmosphere near the huge pool amonst manicured gardens

reviews.title: Average hotel

Staff wasn’t attentive.   Wouldn’t stay here again.  Thought Conrad was higher end than Hilton, it was not.  Mold in cabinet.  Hilton is better.

reviews.title: Miserable Holiday
reviews.text:
Disclaimer :
This is my personal experience. No intention to make bad image of the property. But as valuable feedback for improvement and as insight for readers' consideration as they made their own choices. I am not responsible for what others decide.

Reservation :
Chaotic from the beginning. We moved from other 5 stars in Uluwatu after long day of event and all I wanted was to take some rest, get pampered in 5 stars services.
Book king bed because we have toddler sleeping together with us. As we got in to the room, we were given a twin bed. We checked in at 5pm, and we only get to the right room after 7pm! The lady in reception heartfeltlessly said "it is crowded time". How do you expect a hotel to be, are you sure you want it as quiet as in pandemic?
We were exhausted, late to dinner. And i ended up getting sick during the whole stay.

Housekeeping :
We waited until 7 pm to get the room ready. Which was already far away from the check out/check in time. 2 hrs waiting, expecting it to be squeeky clean. But no. Stains were EVERYWHERE, in the comforter, towels, and even in the walls, i got a hand print of kid, which certainly not mine, because mine was not that tall. Broken shower with sharp end. Both toothbruses were already opened, and lost their tooth paste. I guess housekeeping didnt even mind checking it during clean up and just gave us the used one. Smelly bathrobe..

But i was too exhausted and too sick to let anyone in to the room and fix the chaos.

Hospitality
I would say it was below my expectation for 5 stars. They didnt even follow up the issues and approach me until my 3rd day out of my 4 days of staying.

What they did was only : Offering 1 fresh coconut and a spa voucher, that i could use in limited slot within 24hrs before my check out time - which end up impossible to take. Thank you, but to me that didnt feel like a sincere gesture. They didnt even bother to check if i had enough water in the room when I got high fever - a small gesture I will appreciate more than a late response.

During check out, i met the same lady who did the chaotic check in. She acted like nothing's wrong, being rather cold. Not even say any apology. Sorry, but that's far below indonesian hospitality standard, i'd say.

Highlight of the stay :
Complimentary photo from digiphoto. Mr. Tegar was superb dan very helpful. I did push myself to take this opportunity once I got a bit better on 3rd day, because it might be the only thing left of the holiday. Not in a good health, not in a good mood.

Conclusion :
To me, money comes around. But not the valuable time with my family that we rarely have. So to me personally, for the sake of my precious time with my family, I would rather find another 5 stars who kept their standard of personalized services and hospitality. Lots of options nowadays in Bali.
reviews.response:
Dear Zahra,
Thank you for having placed your confidence in our resort for your recent stay. We are generally known for exceptional service and a wonderful stay experience as noted on many review sites by both first time and multi-repeating guests.
Clearly your recent stay did not at all live up to this reputation and I would like to express my sincere apologies for the shortfalls you experienced during your stay with us at Conrad Bali. I understand that your expectations were not met, and I am truly sorry for any inconvenience or disappointment this has caused. We reviewed the issue for the miscommunication on the bed type you had booked, which caused delay in service upon your arrival (room was allocated and prepared but miscommunication on bed type setup) which caused delays when having to find another appropriate room type.  From there, a number of issues ensued including room cleanliness and condition, elements in our control that are not acceptable. I understand that these issues

besides, all the chairs in swimming pool are fully occupied.   I saw two row of chairs with no ppl sitting  and tried to sit there for sunbathing but requested to move out. As you need to pay extra money for the chairs with good sea view.

reviews.title: A Nice Resort Thats Showing Its Age
reviews.text:
The Conrad Bali is showing its age.  There were many defects in our Deluxe Family Room, which includes leaky hand shower & shower head, electrical socket not working, and some lights that are not working (reading & wardrobe), and shower door that was stuck and cannot be opened.

The facilities are also looking old compared to when we visited the Conrad 2 years ago.  The positive side is that the Resort is very family oriented, with plenty of activities for both kids and adult.  Like Yoga classes, biking tours and etc.  Best of all kids below 12 eat for free if parents order a meal.  Lets hope they renovate their rooms & facilities soon.
reviews.positives: Family Focus, Location, and Kids Facilities

reviews.title: Not up to expectation for Conrad Level
reviews.text:
I guess for the level of hotel such as Conrad, I expect more from the quality and facility of the room and the hotel. We booked a deluxe room but I felt with much cheaper price and choice of hotel below the level of Conrad, I can also get the same thing. The variety of breakfast was standard that can be found in any three or four star hotel that I have been too. It can't even be compared with the breakfast spread of the Intercontinenal Bali. The room was not equipped with iPhone dock which normally available for hotel with such level of Conrad. The shower in the room was weird and hardly we had a nice shower. Level of busyness when we arrived was too many people until the staff forgot totally to give us welcome drink which normally be given by the hotel. 

However for the exterior of hotel, it was beautiful with the magnificent of Infinity chapel, swimming pool and many other beautiful properties.The staff was helpful and friendly.

But overall, we expect more from hotel with such big name such as Conrad

Since I paid via agoda, assuming with some discount, you don't get the 100% view. But soon, myself and families started to cough and sneeze. The room was very dusty and the musty smell was overwhelming. Then we found the toiletries has expired. The cups were dirty. The floor was dusty. We checked in at 7 pm. By 9 pm, we were sneezing all over. For the amount we paid, this was unacceptable.  We called the front desk. By 11.30pm, we changed the room. My son was so tired.. 

The only saving grace was their quick action to change our room. the rest was history. We enjoyed the rest of our stays.

reviews.title: Mixed Feelings: A Beautiful Brand Falling Short of Luxury Standards.
reviews.text:
We chose Conrad Bali to celebrate my wife’s birthday, expecting the high-end luxury experience that the Hilton brand usually promises. 

Unfortunately, our 3-day stay left us with incredibly mixed feelings. While the human element of the resort shines brightly, the hardware, attention to detail, and overall value fell significantly short of a 5-star standard.

Here is the breakdown of our experience:
1. Hospitality & Staff (The Bright Spot)
The staff at Conrad Bali are the resort’s greatest asset. Across the board, we were met with warm smiles, polite greetings, and genuine hospitality. They made a wonderful effort for my wife’s birthday, ensuring she felt celebrated and accommodated throughout our stay.
However, we did notice a strange inconsistency at the front gates. We chose to get around Bali on a motorbike. Every time we returned, the security's welcoming gestures varied wildly. Some guards were incredibly welcoming, while others treated us with a cold, dismissive attitude—leaving us with the uncomfortable impression that guests arriving on bikes are looked down upon as "low class" or vendors. True luxury should mean impeccable service regardless of how a guest chooses to travel.

2. The Room: Confusing Layout & Cheap Amenities
The room layout left us scratching our heads.
- Awkward Furnishings: There was no sofa and only a single chair provided inside the room. This meant my wife and I could never sit at the table together to eat or relax. One of us always had to sit on the bed—which is frustrating when you’ve just come back from a long day outside and aren't ready to get into bed yet.
- Housekeeping Oversight: Upon checking in, a staff member was in our room setting up a birthday cake, and another knocked five minutes later to set up the Yukata. While we appreciated the hustle, we quickly discovered dirty, used floor mats from the previous guest. A luxury resort should have a strict supervisor checklist before handing keys over to Front Office.
- Disappointing Amenities: The room amenities were shockingly basic and felt cheap—reminiscent of a 3-star hotel rather than a premium Hilton brand. Slippers, shavers, and dental kits were subpar, and many items were not fully stocked and had to be requested. The shower layout and furniture placement also felt incredibly awkward—not low standard, but certainly not high luxury.

3. Navigation & Resort Layout
The resort's signage is terrible. Conrad Bali is a sprawling property, but without constantly staring at the paper map given at check-in or stopping to ask staff for directions, it is incredibly easy to get lost. Clearer, more intuitive building signs are badly needed.

4. Food & Beverage: Hits and Misses
We booked a half-board package, which covered our dinners.
- Dinners (Good): The food quality at RIN and Eight Degrees South (EDS) was genuinely good. However, RIN had a massive oversight where they ran out of Salmon. For a flagship Japanese restaurant to not have its star ingredient available is a major inventory failure.
- Breakfast at SUKU (Poor): Breakfast was a major disappointment. It felt bare minimum, featuring hard pastries, very limited variety, and a heavy reliance on carbs and sweets. Had we stayed for a week, we would have been forced to eat breakfast outside the resort by day three.

5. Hidden Costs & Lack of Resort Activities
When you stay at a massive resort in the Nusa Dua/Tanjung Benoa area, you expect a robust schedule of complimentary in-house resort activities. Here, there are almost none. Beyond swimming, table tennis, a giant chess set, and walking, everything else is outsourced to third parties or comes with an extra fee.
It feels like the resort tries to "milk" you at every turn. Even on our half-board package, no drinks were included. If you want a simple bottle of water with your dinner, expect to be charged upwards of 100k++ IDR.

Final Verdict
Conrad Bali has the footprint of a luxury resort and a wonderful team of frontline staff, but the manage
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Nice hotel but not for us
reviews.text:
We spent 7 days at Conrad in a swim up room. To list negatives: Beach average, location isolated, very expensive and everything was a charge, laundry expensive and average job, kids club not good, 200k per adult bike to hire for 5hrs i was quoted while other hotels theyre free, happy hour probably the worst I've come across - choice of 4 drinks 2 of which are arak and you have to buy 2 of the same for the discount, vibe in the afternoons non-existent due to lack of beach front bars/deals/music etc., hot pools, mossie central especially in the back japanese restaurant area, other patrons often rude but probably just due to culture differences - eg everytime we come back from the buffet we would have a story about someone yelling at staff or pushing in or just being obnoxious, facilities very minimal - huge hotel but just nothing really to do apart from swim or lay on a sunbed. I can go on.
Positives: Staff were lovely to us, grounds beautiful and meticulously maintained, most pools joined so you can explore, morning buffet was amazing and restaurants food was great though expensive. 
We had friends stay with us in a less premium room and they had a very different experience on check in, they almost wanted to leave due to rudeness from mgt. 
We would always leave the hotel and eat and hang out at others for better value which is not a good sign.  Id say we made the most of our stay but not what I expected and wouldn't go again.
reviews.response:
Dear Matthew,
On behalf of our entire team, we are truly apologetic for your experience and that you feel entirely let down by your stay.  From other reviews it is clear that this is not the normal experience for our guests and I hope that we would have the opportunity of welcoming you back again when you next visit Bali, although perhaps the atmosphere is likely not to change much in terms of bars and music around the pool and near the beach as we aim to keep a calm and serene approach to the area, with many spaces for guests to relax and unwind while at the pool or overlooking the ocean.  I will be following up with our team to determine what happened on arrival from your friends as this is unacceptable and needs to be addressed immediately.
Thank you for having shared your impressions of our team and their approach to our guests as well as the variety and quality of our breakfast buffet.
Best,
Kevin

The cabana had used mask from before that weren’t cleaned up and I had to asked 3 different person until it was cleaned.
The food needs an upgrade, a little bit boring.
Also utilities in the room or the descriptions on need an upgrade, it said our suite had a microwave but unfortunately there none, mau because of Covid.
Maybe I will come back, mainly because I like how the manager approach people. But I guess other staff really need to learn more about hospitality in this kind of business.

reviews.title: A resort where you can relax quietly and comfortably.
reviews.text:
The ocean view from the room is very beautiful.

The breakfast menu at the restaurant on the first floor of the check-in building has a lot of variety, and almost all the food was delicious. However, compared to the breakfast, the dinner buffet at the same restaurant was somewhat disappointing in terms of variety and taste for the price. The restaurant available only for dinner by the beach has a wonderful view, and the seafood is also tasty.

The pool water is clean, and it's quiet, making it a great place for relaxation. The beach within the resort is also well maintained and clean.

However, if there are many people during check-in, the staff's response can be somewhat frustrating compared to the resort's reputation. Specifically, when I requested check-in in the morning and returned after a meal, the room assigned to me in the morning was not ready, so I had to wait about another hour. They said the room would be ready by 3 PM, so I went at that time, but I had to wait more than 30 minutes, and the staff told me to come back at 3 PM without checking the time, even though I had requested around 3:40 PM.

Although it is a five-star hotel, the water quality in the accommodation is not very clean, as the shower filter I brought got dirty within two days.
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. We are pleased to know that you enjoyed the beautiful ocean view, the extensive breakfast selection, our clean pool, and the tranquil environment of the resort. We are also glad that the beachfront restaurant and well‑maintained beach contributed positively to your stay.
We sincerely apologize, however, for the aspects that did not meet your expectations. Your comments regarding the dinner buffet, delays during the check‑in process, and the inconsistency in staff responsiveness during peak periods are duly noted and will be reviewed with our operational teams to ensure service improvements. We also regret any inconvenience caused by the room water quality and appreciate you bringing this matter to our attention.
Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a smoother and more seamless experience on your next visit.
Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

reviews.text:
Nice hotel, amazing views and was a lovely wedding. 
Staff were polite and helpful however our room smelt of mould and so did our friends room who was staying down the hall. The main pool area was under renovations so we were unfortunately unable to enjoy all the facilities this hotel had to offer. Room service food was average at best, definitely not worth the $40 for steak. However the breakfast which was included in our room was really good!  My husband enjoyed the jet skiing on the beach.
reviews.response:
Dear Lauren,
I am happy to know you enjoyed your stay and the hospitality and services extended by our team contributed to a memorable wedding.
I also greatly appreciate the feedback you shared on the areas which we can improve on,  we are committed to provide every guest with the best quality of products and service possible. 
Congratulations on your wedding, when you would like to refresh your memories or celebrate your anniversary, please come back and visit us once again.

With regards,
Andreas Justkowiak
General Manager

The Conrad Bali Team

reviews.title: Don't use the mini-bar
reviews.text: Our stay began on a very positive note but unfortunately ended on a disappointing one. At checkout, we were surprised to find charges of nearly $70 for five soft drinks and two small snacks from the mini-bar. In most hotels, such items are either complimentary or clearly marked as chargeable, but we were not informed about this policy at check-in. This lack of transparency made us feel misled, and it reflects poorly on the hotel’s ethics and guest communication.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We sincerely apologize for the misunderstanding regarding mini-bar charges. Please note that mini-bar items are chargeable, and the price list is available in the in-room dining menu. We truly regret any inconvenience caused and will work on improving our check-in communication to ensure greater clarity for all our guests. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a stay that exceeds your expectations.

Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
We were staying to celebrate our wedding anniversary and had informed the hotel in advance. However, a birthday cake was mistakenly delivered to our room. We called the front desk and were told someone would get back to us, but no one did. Eventually, we went down ourselves, and a staff member apologized and said the correct cake would be brought to our dinner.

When we returned to our room after turndown service, the birthday cake was still there. It felt as though our special day had been overlooked. Is this really the standard of hospitality one should expect from Conrad?

At dinner, we were initially seated at the table farthest from the dinner show by a female staff member. When we politely asked if we could move to a different seat, she replied twice, “No, is this okay with you?”—a response that felt inflexible and dismissive. We were also disappointed to see that the earlier issue with the mistaken cake had not been communicated to the dining staff. The lack of follow-up and coordination added to our frustration.

Fortunately, another staff member later stepped in, changed our seats, and made sure the correct anniversary cake was delivered. We truly appreciated their thoughtfulness.

Overall, while there were several disappointing moments, other staff members were excellent. We are especially grateful to the kind lady at checkout and the attentive teams at breakfast and by the pool. Thank you for your warm hospitality.
reviews.response:
Dear Midori,
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback about your recent stay with us. We're deeply sorry for the mistakes and inconvenience experienced, particularly with the mistaken birthday cake delivery and seating issues. We understand how important your wedding anniversary celebration was, and we fell short of meeting your expectations. We're taking your feedback seriously and will address the issues with our team. 
Thank you for highlighting both the positives and areas for improvement. We're committed to providing exceptional hospitality and will review our processes.
We hope to have another opportunity in future to welcome you back for a much better experience.
Best - Kevin

reviews.title: Staff saved the day
reviews.text: Rooms were quite dated, and sheets were not the cleanest. But all the staff we encountered treated us with so much kindness and friendliness and interacted so well with our baby boy, we had an enjoyable stay! Best to stroll around the resort as it’s huge! Will stay again!
reviews.response:
Dear Simin,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us recently - we appreciate you having placed your confidence in our team and are delighted you found your overall stay to be positive, highlighted by our team's attentive, personalized and caring service.
Please accept my sincere apologies for the lack of sheets cleanliness and if the room did not match your expectations, had an old feel. Please be assured that we continue to improve our service and facilities to our guests.
Thank you for your feedback and hope to welcome you back on a future trip to Bali.
Best, Kevin

reviews.title: Conrad Bali
reviews.text: We had a fun time and nice stay at Conrad Bali. We booked the Suites room as we are traveling with baby, so two queen beds with the kitchen pantry and vast living room area are plus points for us. There is also balcony. The hotel’s services are great. They lent us microwave and baby chair in-room. One thing though, I requested for baby food (no salt no sugar) and Suku’s chef helped but unfortunately not suitable for my baby’s taste. Also fruits option for baby quite limited (only melon is suitable). Perhaps can add banana, orange, mango. There is no check-in / check-out counter at Suites, so it is also a bit inconvenient. Thankfully we still have time before airport.  Also, while I feel it’s good and convenient to have locals offering on water-sport but I’ve been approached many times each time I was at the beach or pool and I find it slightly distracting. Perhaps a more subtle sales approach would be better.
reviews.response:
Dear Indridewi,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us at Conrad Suites during your recent holiday with family. I am glad you found the suite suitable and that our team took care of your needs; we will note to offer more alternatives to you in terms of fresh tropical fruit when you next return with baby.  We will review with the water sports vendors to adopt a proper approach to our guests to ensure all feel comfortable.
We look forward to welcoming you back again to Conrad when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel one of my favourites.
reviews.positives: It was clean and spacious and never felt over crowded. We requested a later check out which they granted us an extra 1.5hrs. The staff are lovely and friendly.  The RIN restaurant is probably the better restaurant out of the 3 located on site. Good gym facilities. Amazing front lobby absolutely beautiful. Felt very safe during our stay. Drank the ice and was fine. Great hotel!!
reviews.negatives: Half board menu is limited if you’re staying 4+ nights. Gets a bit boring for food. A few dishes on the menu weren’t served with the right ingredients listed on the menu. Found it strange we couldn’t charge anything to our room. We also booked deluxe king room with pool view and definitely could not see the pool from our room. The staff had arranged flower decoration on our bed however it wasn’t actually for us had some someone else’s name on the bed “happy 30th Vincent” when we went and told the front desk they didn’t care or offer to clean it up. there was a hair in my breakfast.

reviews.title: Ocean view what?!
reviews.text: The wedding in front of our room was super annoyin, the ocean view was far and covered by trees. Far away from the lobby. Expensive.

Dear Yorien,
We apologies the Conrad Ocean Suite you enjoyed was partially blocked by foliage.  We will review with our gardening team to trim back as we do on a regular basis.  Indeed the Conrad Suites are part of a separate area to the main resort and on our expansive 7 hectare resort, is perhaps the farthest point from the main lobby.  We hope to find a more convenient location to suit your needs when you are next visiting Conrad.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Expected more from the Hilton brand (Conrad) - Disappointing Stay
reviews.positives:
Overall the hotels main lobby, pools and grounds are aesthetically pleasing but unfortunately that cannot make up for an overall disappointing stay. 
All the staff we encountered were excellent and displayed a high level of professionalism and were very friendly. That being said, the F&B team that handles the breakfast service need additional training ASAP and a complete overhaul of this area of their business.
reviews.negatives:
It appears the hotel priorities events and guests associated with events over the general population being accommodated. A large wedding party commenced on 11/10 which then led to absolute chaos at the breakfast service from that point on. Breakfast service on 12/10 & 13/10 was comical. From waiting to be seated, then eventually seated at filthy tables to staff dropping stacks of plates not once, not twice but three times!. No eggs, no bread and no cups left for diners in the middle / peak of their breakfast service. 

Stayed in room 2114, a ocean facing room which sounded fantastic during the booking process but left us disappointed. A Juliette balcony would be a better description of the ocean facing balcony, no chance of getting any chairs or tables on there to enjoy the view. Unfortunately the beach in front of the Conrad is also the worst kept in terms of other resorts / hotels around the area. A short walk or ride south will demonstrate what other hotels have done with their respective beach areas in front of their hotels and this will leave you further disappointed with the Conrad. 

Room cleaning was also odd. Would have the room service required light on from 0800hrs onwards as we would be out of the room but each day the room wasn't cleaned until we were back and getting ready to go out for sunset / evening. Room was normally cleaned (where we would have to vacate the room) post 1500hrs. We stayed at the Hyatt Sanur and also Anantara Seminyak this trip and the Conrad is far far below the standard of those 2 mentioned hotels yet it has the highest room rate. 

Also bicycles, why are you required to pay for this service? With the price of the room rate one would think the use of bicycles would be free like all the other hotels we have stayed at. 

Final word, wouldn't stay at the Conrad again and it has also put a dampener on potentially staying at other Hilton brand hotels around the world in the future.

We hope the rest of your stay was to your expectation and that you would consider returning again on another opportunity.

Kevin

Other hots such as The Mulia & Kempinski Apurva, they at least allow online food delivery to be placed at the receptionist. Plus I was having a severe diarrhea, and yet they didn’t compensate my breakfast, which I asked to be brought to our room, which my husband will go to the breakfast room and pick some. Well I was quite disappointed.

Their main pool was under renovation at the time so you feel like you're not getting all your money's worth.  I would assume they could've given some discounts given the renovations but yeah.  Our room was really not partial ocean because you can't see anything because of the metal walls for renovation.  :(  The curtains in our room are so old as well, you could see the dirt in them.  :( 

But what they lacked in all of these they made up on superb service.

General Manager

reviews.text: I stayed at Conrad Bali for 4 nights for my honeymoon. We stayed in the ocean view apartment. Building, lagoon pools and ocean view were out of this world. Staff are polite but don't speak English too well. Check out and check in were slow. We checked in at 2pm and the staff didn't even escort us to the waiting lounge, they let us find our own way. Architecture of building is good, but personal touch is lacking.

reviews.title: Nice looking hotel, but service should be better
reviews.text: The hotel is huge, and we got lost quite a few times, trying to go from one place to another. One day the beach was dirty, but after that it was cleaned up. I don't understand why there were so many ants in our room. We stay there in large group, taking a lot of rooms. There were complains for the inconsistencies between one room to another. Some smaller, some with older amenities (such as small CRT TV). The hotel was also ill prepared our our arrival, and spread our group all over their 4 wings (this is why we got lost most of the time). The level of service they provide does not reflect their 5 star rating, or justify their price. The GM should be training his staff better than that. Mind you, we were not the only ones complaining that day, there were a few japanese tourists also complaining.
reviews.positives: The hotel is beautiful, pool is very nice and the breakfast is not bad at all!

reviews.title: Great Pool Villa Stay, but Service Communication Fell Short of Conrad Standards
reviews.text:
We stayed for three nights in a Pool Villa and overall had a very pleasant and relaxing experience. The villa itself was spacious, private, and beautifully maintained, making it a great choice for families with young children. The resort grounds were also stunning, and we truly enjoyed the tropical atmosphere. 

That said, we felt that the service did not fully meet the expectations we had for a well-known five-star brand like Conrad Bali. 

One recurring issue was communication. Several staff members seemed to have difficulty understanding English, which led to repeated misunderstandings. For example, when we asked at the breakfast venue about food options suitable for our 1.5-year-old child, we were repeatedly redirected to room dining or told about takeaway boxes, despite clearly explaining that we were asking about simple items to be prepared or arranged at the restaurant itself.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re delighted to hear you enjoyed the comfort and privacy of the Pool Villa, as well as the resort’s tropical surroundings. We’re truly sorry, however, for the communication challenges you encountered during your stay. This is not the level of clarity or service we strive for, and we appreciate you bringing it to our attention. Your comments have been shared with our team to help us improve. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a smoother and more seamless experience.

Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

reviews.title: Good resort for families and kids; plenty of activities available.
reviews.text: Good place to stay for families and kids, plenty of pools to use. However, the beach is not maintained and rubbish were present on the sand. We also were a bit uneasy as we don’t know if some people were staff or contractors that works in the hotel as they wear different clothing. Plenty of activities to do and events at night time. The staff were amazing and kind.
reviews.response:
Dear Princess,
Thanks so much for your review! We're thrilled you and your family enjoyed the pools, activities, and our amazing team. We appreciate your feedback about the beach and uniforms—definitely something we’ll look into. Hope to welcome you back soon!
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Pleasant stay, good service
reviews.text: Clean room, great room service twice a day, morning and afternoon, where they thoughtfully replaced extra bath towels, drew the curtains. Have the best fluffy pillows too. Love the indo food at Suku restaurant and their 6 types of sambal! Beach just outside is very peaceful to waddle around just after sunrise
reviews.response:
Dear Yi,
Thank you for your glowing description of your recent stay. From how our team took care of your room cleanliness and details to have they prepared food for you at Suku, they are the reason our guests continue to enjoy their stays each time: it all starts with them!
We look forward the opportunity of welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Great hotel for a family with children
reviews.text:
Conrad has a multiple selection of activities for everyone, especially for the youngest guests. SPA was absolutely phenomenal. Good breakfast. 
Agoda sells “vacation packages” for selected rooms, however all what was included in the package was anyway complimentary for hotel guests. Don’t be fooled by this.
reviews.response:
Dear Janusz,
I am glad to learn that the resort activities as well as spa experience were a highlight of your stay.
Thank you for your kind words and we all look forward to welcoming you back soon.
Best regards,
Evelyne

reviews.title: Excellent !
reviews.text: We stayed with 2 kids (3 and 6 years old) in dulexe garden view room, we got the corner room and it was amazing. The room is huge and spacious. The bed was very comfortable and spacious as well. We especially loved the amenities (mojave ghost from byredo) and you can request amenities for kids as well. My kids loved the monkey stuffed doll  and the welcome cookies. Kids club and the pool was amazing. The water is still quite warm even in the evening. Beach was also clean. You can play water sports also. My kids spent wonderful time at the beach hunting crabs, star fish, and playing with the sand. Breakfast was good but can be better. They also have utensils for kids and kids corner on breakfast buffet so this is a very family friendly hotel.  Excellent!
reviews.response:
Dear Lily,
We are grateful to have hosted you and family recently for a well-deserved holiday.  Thank you for having shared your positive impressions and memories.  Glad your children enjoyed the special Conrad monkeys as special keepsakes.
We look forward to welcoming you back when you are next visiting Bali!
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Pleasant but a little outdated
reviews.text: Conrad has been our fave,  been coming to this hotel around 5x with the kids. Staff are helpful and nice as usual, however....some facilities need a little upgrading, the sliding door in bathroom was broken, left door could slide all the way to the other side , which was worrying as we have little kids. Also ... Across our room looked like abandoned villas that create a spooky ambiance in the evening, we couldnt swim pass 6pm (we had pool access room) ... but all in all we would still come back to conrad but perhaps with different room 🫣
reviews.response:
Dear christien,
We were delighted to have hosted you again as a loyal, multi-returning guest of ours.  We appreciate your kind comments on our team's attention to you during your stay, and apologize you felt the room condition was not to standard.  We will locate the room in which you stayed and ensure the elements you detailed are rectified as soon as possible.
We look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back again to your home in Bali for what will surely be an improved stay experience.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Great hotel

Thank you for having chosen to stay at Conrad Bali and we are delighted you were impressed with your stay.

reviews.title: Great Stay But..
reviews.text:
Our stay was enjoyable and the facilities were well maintained. However, some of the staffs were rude and seems to lack of experience. Local and foreigners treated differently. Like when we had our breakfast, the staffs treated foreign tourist who sit beside us nicely. But to us? meh. example: I ordered a cup of coffee and had to remind them 5 times (at the end i didn’t get my coffee and left with a bad mood)

Please treat all of your guest the same :) thank you!
reviews.response:
Dear Salsabila,
We are terribly sorry you were left to feel as though treated differently than other guests.  Our aim is to treat each guest individually, as they wish to be treated.  We train our team to look to make genuine connections with each guest, and not make any assumptions as to expectations.  Having to remind for coffee service five times is unacceptable and we share sincere apologies.  We will be following up with our teams accordingly for improvement straight away and hope you understand your comments are greatly valued and will be put to immediate action for improvement.  We hope to restore your confidence in our service and look forward to welcoming you back with us again for a better experience when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Giant older suites in a fabulous location
reviews.text:
The grounds of this hotel is amazing.. incredible for weddings and parties and holidaying.  Very peaceful. 
Could do with a cool slide or two for kids,  an upgrade in the suites to look more modern and aurconditioning in the main lobbys, buffets etc. 
Kids had a great time in the pool and we really enjoyed the space and breakfasts and meals. 
The staff that checked me in needed and overall the poor communication with waiters and misunderstanding over orders etc need focus for improved English skills.  Aside from very very minor complications we had a great time!!!
reviews.response:
Dear Aruni,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us and appreciate your kind and constructive comments.  We will action accordingly with our team to ensure no gaps in communication when you next return with us.  We hope to have the opportunity of welcoming you back with us when you are next in Bali here at Conrad.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.text:

My sister washtafel was clogged at 2 AM and 3 staffs come right away to repair it. Breakfast was good. We also get free photo sessions with photographer which is very memorable for our family. Got many watersports right at the beach. 
(-) beach view is not so nice, the sea is on low tide in the evening so you can’t swim in the sea. The food at in dining room and pool bar is too pricey. 

Overall it was a great stay with the value of money, thank you Conrad!

reviews.title: Disappointing unless you enjoy a queue
reviews.text: 40 + mins to check in. Told to have a seat outside (hot, humid, while wearing warm clothes having just got off a flight) as no room inside. Had to stand inside after 48 hours of travel and then we were queue jumped but a bunch of rude customers. No system for checkin. Breakfast again more queuing. Classic case of a greedy hotel not geared up for the peak Christmas season while renovating. If you turn one restaurant into a reception then you need to reduce your room availability. Spa also a massive disappointment- being renovated (like reception) so using suites only thing is walls are paper thin and the swimming pool is right next door - not relaxing. Rooms great, pool amazing and staff friendly - Christmas saved on this basis.

reviews.title: Standards have dropped, likewise, the price
reviews.text: The standards of this property as dropped since I last visited in 2015. One can find some summer flies (non-blood sucking types) in the room upon entering. They used to reach out to guests to help arrange for airport transfer but not this time. Would I still return, yes, pretty much because overall, the resort is clean and serene for a quiet weekend break.

reviews.title: Nice landscaping and layout but in need of renovation.
reviews.text:
The rooms with direct pool access would be nice had the pool itself was cleaner.  Yes, much of the fallen leaves and debris were due to the windy and rainy weather but the water was murky and tasted salty. At least the main pool had clearer water. 
The hotel complex is walkable in the sense that you can easily walk just short distances from your rooms to the main restaurants, pools and the beach compared to other resorts that must resort to buggy rides to get to anywhere. 
The rooms require a timely renovation, which one wing of the complex is undergoing, as the wooden fixtures were showing their age. The most issue I had was with the confusing shower handle that took too much time to figure out. The showerhead's noozle was too small and the fittings were loosening up.

reviews.title: Lovely Service
reviews.text:
The hotel offered to help me with a birthday surprise for my bf by giving us a complimentary cake. And they emailed me a few times and called me before I departed for Bali. Very touched by their excellent service. 
Was disappointed with the hotel's renovation at the lobby which we were not informed when we booked the room but thankfully they gave us complimentary upgrade to a sea view room as a gesture of goodwill. 

Every staff there was welcoming and provide excellent service. I was injured by the corner of the bed frame and bled a little. Went to the reception and they immediately sent me to the hotel's doctor who gave me a dressing and some painkillers at no charge. 

The most awesome thing about the stay was the Departure Lounge which guests can use even after checking out of the hotel. There's hot shower (equipped with toiletries), towel and hairdryer on request. There are plenty of seats at the lounge, free coffee, tea and cookies as well as a pool table for use. And TV too of course!

Price is a little too steep but I guess that's normal for Nusa Dua.

reviews.title: Inifinity Chapel glazing for pre wedding shoot
reviews.text: wonderful Experience with a lovely beach, where u really can let go of the daily stuff and lay on the beach bed listening to the sound of waves and cooling breeze. It is near to the airport that cost 150k rup to Conrad and 100K back to airport. Taxi can be expensive since all day jam in the city. lots of tourist places have strict rules and often comes with a condition, money!!Especially for couple like us going for prewedding shoot, they charges us from 200k to 1 million rup depending on locations. Absolutely disgracing, just because we taking pre wedding shoot we paying more than 20 x the normal entry fee of ~ 10-20k. They will tried act very fierce and forced you to pay whatever the amount they put up. For us to travel there to take picture or video, we have to succumb to their demands. Wonderful venue for wedding shoot but let down by poor government management. Rent a car for a day to travel will be more cost efficient as lots of jam around the city and this will add to a high taxi fee. Bali will be a romantic place like Paris if only it make do away with all the exorting prices that tourist are subjected to. At least we found a great hotel that we can still relax upon even if we didn't go out.

reviews.title: A five-star hotel with professional staff, but overcrowded and lacking local character—unfortunately
reviews.positives: Once the reservation issue was acknowledged, the guest services team handled it professionally within a few hours, despite the hotel being fully booked. They kindly moved us to two different rooms during our stay—both were spacious and comfortable. The RIN restaurant was peaceful and enjoyable. The beach was fun for walking out during low tide, especially for kids. The property itself has all the expected features of a five-star resort.
reviews.negatives: Our reservation experience was disappointing. Although we had clearly communicated we were a family of four and requested a pool-access room, we were initially given a small room in an isolated corner with a construction view—even though we had paid for an upgrade. The hotel was extremely crowded, especially at breakfast, with long queues and a loud atmosphere. It felt more like an American resort than a local Balinese experience, with very little cultural touch. Unfortunately, the overall vibe was too busy for us, and we wouldn’t choose this hotel again.

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text:
Conrad is a beautiful place to stay, the pools are large and didn't feel like it is too crowded. and the beachfront makes it easier for the kids to do activities, such as banana boats, parasailing, etc. 
Rooms were quite okay, as we get the corner room, so it is much bigger than the other rooms.
reviews.positives: Beaches, Pools, Breakfast

reviews.title: Beautiful amazing resort for family , very good blend of authentic feel of being in Bali with a balanced touch of modern
reviews.positives: I loved the hotel lobby with its touch of authentic Bali feel mixed with modernism. The main pool with its lush landscaping is stunning. the drop off experience it’s very well designed also. Our room was spacious, with a beautiful view of landscaping . Staff were incredibly friendly and courteous. They have a seaside restaurant with a great setting and lovely sea food.
reviews.negatives: We were disappointed with the kids club, it was designed for toddlers only, and we therefore couldn’t leave our 7 year old and couldn’t enjoy some time alone at all. As for our room, even though spacious, didn’t have much shelves so our clothes ended up scattered all over the room. Food in the seafood restaurant was amazing, but for the main restaurant could be better .

reviews.title: large room,closer to beach,nice pool
reviews.positives: clean,nice and big pool

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives:
Clean, friendly helpful staff
Good food
reviews.negatives: Rubbish WiFi

reviews.title: A pleasant stay.
reviews.text: Overall our family had a pleasant stay at Conrad. Had a few problems with the air conditioning and noise from the ducting in the ceiling but they were attended to very promptly by the hotel engineer.
reviews.positives: Clean, nice pool, close to the beach.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Very nice hotel and staff

reviews.title: Resort hotel probably best for families
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a beautiful setting and the facilities were great - numerous pools and sunbed areas to choose from. It was quite busy when I stayed as it was over Nyepi and there were a lot of families around so I wouldn't necessarily recommend for a solo traveller like myself. However the room was very comfortable, the breakfast options were very good & the staff were very accommodating.
reviews.negatives: The gym could have been better for a hotel of this size.

reviews.title: big pool, fun place, clean, nice restaurant
reviews.positives: pool, restaurant, clean room

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.positives: Pool access room
reviews.negatives: The initial room we were placed in #1104

reviews.title: Very relaxing and traquil
reviews.positives: The swimming pools and gardens were beatifully designed and maintained. The service was impeccible

reviews.title: Beautiful Resort with very relaxing atmosphere
reviews.positives:
The hotel is very well located in Nusa Dua. The facilities are very nice and convenient, the breakfast is good and has a lot of different varieties if you’re staying for a long vacation.


The staff was very friendly and welcoming, always willing to help, however some staff members had some language communication difficulties, which made it difficult sometimes to understand our requests etc…
reviews.negatives:
The pool villa definitely needs an upgrade, the furniture is very old and the room has a very unpleasant smell of old musty wood. 

The AC had some issues to control and adjust the temperature and the housekeeping team tried solving it couple of times, but the controls were not easy to setup as it’s an old AC system apparently.


The private pool in the villa was not clean and it shows that it doesn’t get cleaned regularly, which was very disappointing considering that the pool villa is one of the most expensive and has the highest room rate in the hotel, so you would expect it to be in top notch condition. 

Would recommend having a lagoon access room instead, if you’re willing to have pool access all day as other guests were very pleased with it.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: Beach, room and atmosphere

reviews.title: Not the best but okay
reviews.positives: Loved the beach and the water activity also the pool out kid had so much fun with it
reviews.negatives: Small rooms, there is no seats or service on the beach in front while other hotels have, too many tourists, and in my opinion it dose not worth 350$ a night there is many better options

reviews.title: Lovely Hotel with Great Beach
reviews.text: Nice hotel, well decorated, large room, very good service, quite and relax ambience
reviews.positives: Setting and ambience

reviews.title: Wonderful stay.  Bad check-in experience
reviews.positives: The location, beach front property, rooms and swimming pool
reviews.negatives:
The check-in experience.  My check-in experience with Dewi was very disappointing.  Upon check-in, she informed me that my room was a garden-view room. I asked her if I can see the ocean from that room, she said “you can only see the garden.”  So I asked her if I could upgrade my room to an ocean view room. She said she will check. I also checked on booking.com if ocean-view rooms were available and they were available. No where on booking.com it says that only a few or only one room left, which means there should be more than a few ocean view rooms left. Dewi came back and said that there were no ocean view rooms left and that the reservation department have forgotten to update the rooms availability on booking.com. How can a hotel with a highly reputable management (Conrad/Hilton) fail to update their rooms availability to real-time with their third-party reservations? 
Fortunately, when I entered my room, the view was garden and ocean (please see photo).  I was very happy. But why did Dewi said that I can only see the garden?  Why didn’t she know the hotel room types which caused me unnecessary disappointment?

reviews.title: nice hotel, great room, great location
reviews.text: We stay in this hotel for 3 nights, the room is big and clean. The hotel has a private beach at nusa dua area. We are  really happy to stay here, the food are excellent and we cant wait to come back here. Thank you Conrad!

feel secured when passed through the gate and to the lobby.

The breakfast buffet was the same everyday.  Food was not as good compared to thailand.  No free internet in room

reviews.text: My holiday stay in this hotel is excellent. I can enjoy most of all this hotel's facility. Nice breakfast and nice service...Keep with it

reviews.title: Great room with best location

Room is great, service was awesome. Location is great if you like to do water sport. 
The only thing that this hotel need to improve is the breakfast menu. They need to have more food's option. Otherwise service is five stars.
reviews.positives: Very "family" friendly hotel

reviews.title: Holiday in Bali
reviews.text: My first glimpse of the hotel was at the security guard. Excellent security and the courtsey of the guards made me feel very secure in view of the latest bombing incident at Jakarta. The reception was lovely and the service impeccable with first class service. Room service was excellent and the view from my room was lovely. I could watch the sun rise from my window and it holds fond memories for me. Room relatively large and the bath tub made me feel so decandent and terrible romantic. kudos, it's a lovely place to go for R and R.
reviews.positives: great service, wonderful view, great landscaping of the lawn
reviews.negatives: expensive pricing of the food, beach rather dirty

It was a great experience. Resort was kids-friendly. Breakfast was OK with many selection to choose from. Pools were nice. Staff was great and friendly. Room was comfortable and spacey enough for family with children. 
The only setback is the water in the bathroom smelled chlorine like in swimming pool. Overall, it was a pleasant stay. Recommended.

reviews.text: My stay at Conrad Bali is excellent! The Infinity Chapel view was beautiful. The environment in Conrad Bali was tranquil and offered a great moment for relaxation. There was a check-out lounge supplied with bathrooms and coffee & snacks. Guests who had checked out but whose departure time was not due could use the lounge. Staff were friendly and always greeted us with smiles!
