reviews.text: It's great. the room, the view, the surrounding is very good but come on no wifi in room is really lame. they only have wifi in lobby area
reviews.positives: Close to beach, Nice pool, nice room

reviews.title: Relaxing long weekend in Bali
reviews.text: Very relaxing (I read three books in three days) and quiet-just what I was looking for. Loved having my family with me as well. It was a special treat for having published my book "Diary of An Expat in Singapore)!
reviews.positives: Buffet breakfast, lush gardens, ocean at doorstep

reviews.title: Staff service superbly handled child emergency
reviews.text: My 4yr old fell onto the space between the 2 beds and completely knocked out his front tooth while my wife and I were out for dinner.  The nanny called the hotel staff for help and a doctor and nurse promptly arrived to attend to my son professionally and with proper medication.  By the time we arrived back to the room all had been taken care of and my son was peacefully asleep.  The following 2 days I was visited by the duty manager each day to make sure all was ok.  What service!  My son proceeded to have a wonderful time at the kids club which had all sorts of activities with the highlight being the balinese dress up & dance which was wonderful.  Thank you Conrad Bali to your wonderful staff for a beautiful holiday :)
reviews.positives: Staff, room size, child activity center

reviews.title: Nice Family Hotel
reviews.text: It's always a pleasure to come back to Conrad Bali, since i always spent a few days when i came to bali since a few years ago. The hotel staff is very friendly. There is an area that may need to be consider to be improved, the food quality and variety for breakfast. But in overall it's a nice family hotel.
reviews.positives: Friendly Satff, Swimming Pool and  Water Sport

reviews.title: Excellent hotel, as expected...
reviews.text: A very pleasant stay, the room was huge and clean, the bed was also very very comfortable with complete amenities such as huge bathtub with separate shower and dressing area. The hotel also very considerate to supply free mineral water as Bali's weather was hot. There are however a little set back during the check in and check out, our room wasn't ready until 3pm and the are a long queue for both times. This however should never be a problem for this kind of hotel, because there should be enough staff if they work efficiently.
reviews.positives: Large room, very comfortable, 24hr Gym.

reviews.title: Very relax stay
reviews.positives: lots of pavilion for us to relax and chill ourselves along the beach, many spa treatment available and had try the seafood night dinner and its delicious

reviews.title: Excellent value-for-money Beach Hotel
reviews.text:
Conrad Bali is a 5* hotel and the pictures online are an accurate representation of the property - which is HUGE yet quiet - and has immaculately maintained gardens throughout. 
PROS - large rooms, good mix of asian/western men, good wine list for Indonesia, modern design and great pools. It is suitable for couples, family, weddings, everything because of the size of the property
CONS - the hotel is very good, but it had no real differentiating factor compared to other 5* hotels in the area (perhaps with the exception of the Wedding Centre / Chapel - if you are getting married, this is truly amazing). Food/Drinks were definately expensive even by USD Western standards, which is unneccessary in Bali to pay NYC prices for a Coke/Beer/Club Sandwich (the Rooms arent very expensive though, so that made it more acceptable)
reviews.positives: Huge pools, high quality restaurants, amazing grounds-keeping

reviews.title: Everything is great at Conrad Bali
reviews.text:
Great facilities and service. Delux Garden Room is every clean and comfortable. Staff provide excellent service and always smile.

The wedding chapel is super awesome, especially in sunset.

The garden swimming pool is spacious and equipped with basketball rims. Boys had so much fun playing water basketball.
reviews.positives: Beautiful wedding chapel

reviews.title: Good location and very nice facilities for couple
reviews.text: We like the place with friendly people and service. The rooms are clean and well maintain. Good for honeymoon as the location is not crowd and noisy.
reviews.positives: Like the ambience with lovely swimming pools

reviews.title: Nice location on the beach, large rooms
reviews.text: My husband and I enjoyed our 2 night stay in Nusa Dua, but for us 2 nights was enough. We'd not been to Nusa Dua before so thought we'd give it a try. Nusa Dua itself was fine - but not a place we'd rush back to - especially having spent the past 7 nights outside Ubud and in the lush tropical landscape of East Bali. The hotel itself was very good and what you'd expect from a high end international chain. Service was great, and the pools were lovely. Try and ask for a garden view or beach view room - we had a laguna room and it did feel as though we had been shunted off to one of the rooms with the worst view. That said, the room itself was very large and comfortable - though there were signs of ware and tear which I would not expect from a 5* hotel. Overall we enjoyed our stay at the Conrad and recommend the hotel - especially for families with children / teenagers.
reviews.positives: Pools, location, large rooms

reviews.title: Awesome hotel
reviews.text:
It was an awesome experience as it was for my honeymoon. I asked front desk if they can do something extra for the occasion but nothing was done. Also my wife's hand was mildly burned from the pudding cake handle during breakfast and staff wasnt too concern w/her well being. 
Other than that it was a great stay. We had a great time relaxing by the pool.
reviews.positives: Facility of the hotel n breakfast buffet

reviews.title: great beach resort in bali
reviews.text:
Conrad hotel is great resort with huge pool.
nice to stay here for relax an enjoy the private beach in front of the resort. 
The room is luxury, comfort and clean.
But need improvement for the activities and kids klub.
reviews.positives: good private beach, huge pool

reviews.title: Impressive Service
reviews.text: The service at Conrad Bali is really good, while I checked-in and waited for my room, they even arranged a complimentary lunch for us. They also arranged a birthday cake for my girlfriend as the staff notice the next day was my girlfriend's birthday during registration. Impressive service I would say! However, the rooms condition for me is normal, I found a blood stain on my bed and during midnight the air conditioner are noisy. Overall, I just love their service.
reviews.positives: Impressive service and great location
reviews.negatives: Room condition

reviews.title: Nice facilities but expensive food and few animations
reviews.text: Beautiful resort but dining is super expensive and there is no bar with music etc.
reviews.response:
Dear Alexandre,
Thank you for staying with us recently. We are delighted you found the resort to be in beautiful condition, and apologize you felt the value offered in our restaurants fell short of your expectations. We hope the various events five times a week in our restaurants and bars on a future visit would be able to turn around your impressions.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Service is exceptional, Big and clean room, big swimming pools.
reviews.response:
Terima kasih Pak Ridwan!
We were delighted to have hosted you and look forward to welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Not fully renovated
reviews.text: Some areas are dated. Overall ok though
reviews.response:
Thank you Pak Iwan! We were delighted to host you and family recently and are thrilled you felt well taken care of.
We hope to welcome you back with us again when you are next in Bali!
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Family Holiday
reviews.text: Staff are amazing! Hotel has beautiful pools and rooms but the kids club needs a revamp. The rooms are spacious and clean, the bathroom was spotless. Room service for kids meals were perfect, pasta for an adult meal, not too good. Breakfast was a huge variety of food and the highlight was the kids station that consists of a donut board and beautifully presented kids stuff. The immunity boost shots at the breakfast station were amazing and the complimentary western by order meals were great, eggs Benedict and avo on toast to name a few, there are so many other options and the international buffet was really good, only downside is the tourists that cough all over the food, put your hand by your mouth or move away, it's common courtesy. The ice-cream station at the pool is amazing, lifesize chess board and outdoor Ping pong table was so much fun, the water aerobics was awesome to watch, that guy does a brilliant job! The bathroom toiletries are top of the range products and the extension tv selection was perfect. The bar at the lobby was amazing and served delicious cakes. We will be back and highly recommend this hotel
reviews.response:
Dear Michelle,
We are truly grateful you took the time to share your positive experience with us in such detail. Our team remains focused daily on delivering a consistently high level of service to our guests, from food quality, resort activities and to making each guest feel warm and welcome. We look forward to welcoming you and family back again to Conrad when you are next in Bali.
Best, Kevin

reviews.title: A bit expensive
reviews.text:
The staff were all very friendly, as expected of a 5-star hotel. The rooms were spacious, but the designs need to be updated. The swimming pool is huge. The children really enjoyed it. The hotel has access to the beach, where all the water sports are easily available. The breakfast menus were delicious with many choices. 

Overall, we had very good stays there. They even gave us free family photos taken by professional photographer. My only complaint is that the price is a bit expensive.
reviews.response:
Dear Andrew,
We are delighted to have hosted you recently and appreciate you took the time to share your positive comments, especially that your kids enjoyed their time and that you found our team and service to the level of a five star resort.
We hope you enjoyed the photoshoot too and have walked away with a positive memory, and to welcome you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Average tour
reviews.text: Hotel shall arrange some activity and dance program every evening for people staying and of course some music at pool also
reviews.response:
Dear Hemant,
Delighted to have hosted you recently and for having posted your impressions of your stay. We host twice weekly live music at East Lobby Lounge as well as two live cultural performances for guests to enjoy.  The rest we try to keep quiet and enjoyable as guests look to relax, unwind and listen to the sounds of nature and the ocean.
We hope to welcome you back and share places nearby where you can really let loose and dance the night away! 
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: HHonors Don’t Book via Agents
reviews.text: Hotel is good and does not have any issue apart from they don’t value you relation with them and does not count your nights with them unless you book directly with Hilton. They don’t care about your loyalty if you book via some online portal you are not their customer but online agency is. So it’s better to be loyal with Agoda or booking than Hilton.
reviews.response:
Dear Yogesh,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us recently, and delighted to learn you enjoyed your stay without issue.  Indeed when booking through non-Hilton partners, Honors points are not awarded for such stays.  This should not take away anything from your stay as guests who book via Agoda enjoy other exceptional benefits and rewards for future stays.
We hope to see you back with us again for another positive stay experience.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: A dream vacation that didn’t disappoint
reviews.text:
The Conrad is a beautiful and clean hotel at a prime location. 
The staff were courteous and upgraded our room to ocean view as we are HH members. 
We walked through this hotel 10 years ago and vowed to stay someday and we were not disappointed. 
Service was impeccable and the dining was excellent
reviews.response:
Dear Chandra,
Absolutely delighted to hear your recent stay with us at Conrad was just as you had expected.  We were thrilled to have hosted you and truly look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali for another relaxing and inspiring experience.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Fantastic vacagtion
reviews.text:
The hotel was fantastic, big swimming pool and the room lagoon access is special experience. 

All staffs are very kind and willing to support whatever I asked. 

But, refrigerator inside the room is not cold enough. Also the food inside is not cost-effective solution.
reviews.response:
Thank you Dowoon for your kind comments on your recent stay here at Conrad Bali. Our lagoon access rooms are indeed a highlight for most of our guests and we are glad you enjoyed your experience.  We look forward to welcoming you back again when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Good, However Book Ahead!
reviews.text:
A good place to stay, especially for families. Lots of facilities for kids. You might not enjoy this place too much if you're travelling as a couple, just as adults, and if you're staying multiple nights. Purely because this is a very family friendly centric accommodation.

Note however, if you are booking last minute (like us), a lot of the restaurants and facilities will be booked out, we were forced into in-room dining as a result. Lots of restaurants outside though, only a Grab away.
reviews.response:
Dear Jason,
Thank you for having chosen to stay with us recently as a couple.  Sorry your stay was not entirely as expected as over the Easter holiday we do tend to welcome families from all over the world for the break.  We are looking soon to relaunch our Club facility which would be open to couples or 13+ yrs.  Watch for more information soon!
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Conrad Bali is situated in Nusa Dua. Nice area in Bali. Good for family vacation where facilities is conducive to young and old alike. Enjoy
reviews.response:
Thank you for your kind review and comments Yong! Hope to see you back with us when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: nice vintage / old hotel....
reviews.text: go for the suites, because the room is rather old. all good thou.... watersports available in front of the beach so no hassle goin out to play watersports
reviews.response:
Dear Labana,
We were delighted to have recently hosted you here at Conrad! Thank you for having chosen to stay with us and glad you enjoyed the watersports and suites.
Hope to welcome you all back when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: The location is in Nusa Dua…so unless you are coming to do just RR and not go anywhere then this hotel is ideal. Great beach for water sports and good facilities. The flip side was during our 7 days stay…the breakfast section was too crowded and understaffed…service was poor as it took forever to get ur coffee and drinks….think hotel cut its staff so they are very overwhelmed…otherwise its good. Also we drove to bali so had our car with us…the valet took over 15mntw the first two days…upon complaining the service proved. Also a nice gesture from hotel would be to wash your car…at least for guests who are staying over 3days and who has their own car….this happens in the rest of the hotels I had stayed in bali.
reviews.response:
Dear Peter,
Thanks for having chosen to stay with us for your week long vacation in Bali!  We are pleased to know your stay went well for the most part, and apologize for the slower coffee service at breakfast. reviews.title: Great Hotel For Watersport In Bali
reviews.text:
Tanjung Benoa is the best place to enjoy watersports in Bali. Tourists can enjoy watersport activities such as Jet Skiing, Banana-Boat riding, Flying-Fish riding, Snorkeling, and Parasailing.

Normally, watersport's enthusiasts have to leave their hotels and go to the spots / vendors providing these activities to enjoy the watersport.

But staying at Conrad Hotel, it is very convenient to enjoy the watersport, one just need to go to the beach at the back of the hotel, and the watersport will be coming at you. The vendors will be showing you the services and the kinds of the watersport activities you can enjoy and you can start having fun right there at the hotel's beach.
reviews.positives: No need to go outside of the hotel to enjoy the watersport.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel, wonderful service

reviews.title: Spacious room with nice service
reviews.text:
We stayed for 3 days and 2 nights. The room was spacious and so large, we love it so much. The bathroom was also nice and large. The complimentary drinks were always filled in, so you don't need to buy mineral water from outside because the room service will always fill it in for you. 

The beach bale was very cozy, you can easily fall to sleep there while reading and looking to the ocean. The hotel even offered free fruits to the guests in pool and bale, making it very difficult to get up from the bale 

There are also yoga classes, and water yoga classes, which was very enjoyable and burn your calories.

However, the breakfast menu was not many and the breakfast price is too expensive compared to what they serve. I suggest that you skip the breakfast or buy breakfast outside which is more value for money.
reviews.positives: Spacious room and bathroom, warm service

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel with a beautiful beach
reviews.text: The beach was fantastic. Relaxing in the beach shale was a wonderful experience. Had an enjoyable lunch at Eight degrees South but wish the barbecue dinner was available every night instead of just on the weekends. The infinity chapel was awesome and I hope to be able to hold my wedding there as well. Service was good as the staff helped to tidy up the beach shale prior to us occupying it.

reviews.title: Lovely Resort Hotel
reviews.text:
Stayed at this resort hotel for 3 days and found it to be a wonderful place to just kick back and relax. The rooms are generally large and very well appointed. The only disappointing thing about the rooms in my opinion is the extremely poor showerhead which does not allow sufficient water to enjoy a comfortable shower, which is surprising in a hotel of this class and expense. There is however, also a handheld shower piece, which provides a better water flow.

The grounds and location on the beach is truly beautiful although there are not really any restaurants, bars or shopping nearby and so it requires arranging a taxi or other form of transport to take you to those locations.
reviews.positives: Large rooms, beautiful location, great service

reviews.title: Fantastic suite and excellent service
reviews.text:
We booked a garden deluxe room but was upgraded to a suite upon checking in. We love the layout of the suite and ultra comfy super king bed. There was plenty of room for the 15month old toddler to run around. Service was excellent with a number of freebies that comes with the suite, ie complimentary afternoon tea, cocktails and discounts at their restaurants. They can even deliver all these to your suite if you prefer privacy. Wifi was complimentary too but slow.
The only things would need improvement on are:
1.freshness of their produce (not too keen on their fruits) and the lack of options for breakfast (even though you get a complimentary cooked breakfast in addition to the buffet)
2.The mixers in the suite are not the most user-friendly things in the world.Given the hotel provides instructions on how to turn the taps on, I guess it is a common complaint amongst the guests.
reviews.positives: Spacious, well-kept suite and friendly helpful staff

reviews.title: A wonderful vacation.
reviews.text:
The rooms at this hotel are spacious and quiet, and the lounge chairs on the balcony are also large. The view is great and perfect for relaxation. The sunrise in the morning is particularly beautiful, coinciding with my birthday. The hotel prepared decorations on the bed and a small cake, which made me very happy.

The variety of breakfast is rich, appealing to both adults and children, and the swimming pool is spacious and clean.

Overall, the service staff performed well—friendly and patient. Two things left a particularly good impression on us. The spa was very professional and relaxing, although it wasn't cheap. The other was the lifeguard by the pool. My child's ankle accidentally got stuck in the slipper, and it was lodged very tightly, making the child almost cry. The lifeguard kindly brought some soapy water and other lubricating liquid to help my child get their foot out of the slipper. I am really very grateful to him.

The restaurant service level here is inconsistent. We had a great meal and service at Suku, but the experience at the Eight Degree restaurant was terrible (March 16). First, the waiter (who was a man in dark clothing and seemed to be a senior employee) prioritized serving Western customers, even though we were sitting right next to the table he was serving. Despite my several attempts to signal him, there was no response—not even a nod or a wave. Instead, a distant staff member came to greet us. Secondly, because I had booked a spa for the evening, after waiting for 15-20 minutes, I urged them to arrange the food quickly, but the speed did not improve. Thirdly, we ordered an eggplant dish, but the eggplant was overcooked; we ordered a lobster, but it was extremely salty. Fourthly, a bug got into my water cup, which was not the worst part. When I changed to a completely new cup of water, another bug was lying in my new cup. This experience that night was truly unpleasant. Although they later reduced some menu items and sent re-prepared dishes to the room, the wonderful dinner under the seaside sunset had already been ruined.

Overall, it was a pleasant stay, but there were some unpleasant little incidents.
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing such a detailed review. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the spacious and quiet room, the beautiful sunrise, the thoughtful birthday touches, and the facilities including breakfast, the pool, and the spa. We also appreciate your kind recognition of our team, especially the lifeguard who assisted your child.
At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the service and food quality issues you experienced at Eight Degrees South. The delays, inconsistency in service, and concerns with the dishes served do not reflect the standards we aim to provide. Your comments have been shared with the relevant teams for immediate follow‑up and improvement.
Thank you again for your balanced feedback. We are glad your overall stay was pleasant, and we hope to welcome you back for a smoother and fully enjoyable experience.

Best regards,
The Conrad Bali Team

reviews.title: Amazing hotel with room to improve
reviews.positives: Conrad Hotel in Bali exceeded our expectations. The service was impeccable. Staff went out of their way to make us feel welcome even taking and entertaining our children. The grounds, which were expansive, were lovely and very well manicured. It was relaxing just walking around. The room we stayed in was very large, we'll appointed and comfortable.
reviews.negatives:
While the staff was amazing and attentive, the food selection for the poolside service was very average (a few more options would have been appreciated). There were also insufficient number of shady areas around the pool.

The food prices inside the hotel were on the pricier side (given the pricing for restaurants in Nusa Dua). The hotel is located in an area without much else around forcing you to catch taxis if you want to go for lunch or dinner outside. 

The lighting in the bathroom was terrible for make-up and shaving.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great resort for families with young children. Loved the view, the fantastic staff and the breakfast! Very close to the airport - just what you need when travelling with kids! Perfect stay.
reviews.response:
Brilliant! Thank you Annika!
Look forward to welcoming you and family back with us again when you next visit Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Peaceful Escape with Amazing Pools and Breakfast
reviews.positives: We had a great stay at the resort. The pools were beautiful, the lawns were well-maintained and relaxing, and the breakfast had a great variety with something for everyone. Overall, a very enjoyable experience—we’d love to come again.

reviews.title: Pillow and bath towel issue
reviews.text:
Conrad is such an amazing hotel. I can't express how happy we are staying in this hotel for 6 days.

2 things that this hotel needs to fix to score a 10 out of 10:
- the pillows smell. I have tried to exchange several times but still the same issue. Pillow sheet is supreme clean but the pillow itself needs treatment. It smells sweat and needs proper procedure to make it dry and smell fresh.
- some of the bath towels smell a bit like fried oil. But this is hit and miss. Not all of them smell like that. Some smells very clean dry and nice.

Other than the two points above, i score the hotel and everything that comes with it a 10/10 including breakfast staff etc. Hope you can address the two points above for our next visit please!
reviews.response:
Dear Kristanto,
Thank you for your feedback, I am glad that you enjoyed an overall stay with us. Please accept our sincere apology for the shortcoming you experienced with respect to the condition of the pillow and bath towel in your guestroom; this is clearly not to our standard and something that will be addressed immediately with our team.  We hope to welcome you back to Conrad Bali on a return visit to the island and that we will be able to make it up to you with an elevated experience, as you would have expected of us the first time.
Best regards,
Evelyne

reviews.title: A very comfortable, upmarket, clean, spacious and friendly resort. There's no risk here!
reviews.positives: There was a generous breakfast spread, with a large variety of foods. Lunch at pool was good, dinners at the 3 restaurants was nice, but on nights when buffets were setup they were average. Pools were great and clean. Staff were extremely attentive, friendly and accommodating. Ample pool loungers, and pool towels available.
reviews.negatives: The quality of the continental section was not to my expectation (variety of hams and cheeses was not great, had to order oats for kids which took a while). Its a family resort, but not many family activities. There's a kids club but not a great one. Kids under 4 require additional supervision by parent or nanny, which defeats the point. There are extra activities at Kids club available for extra charge. Stayed over Easter,. I was disappointed by the lack of activities or recognition of Easter for the kids, other than a simple (extra charge) program at kids club.

reviews.title: Wonderful family trip with young kids
reviews.positives:
We stayed at Conrad King Suite for 2 nights, and I wish we had stayed longer. The staffs were very friendly and attentive with our needs. We booked for half-board and did not leave the hotel until we checked out. The pool was perfect temperature with shades to swim in the afternoon. During daytime the kids can go to their kids club with aircon (quite small but it was fine for our two kids, 4 and 1). 
We noticed the weird smell of cigarettes in our room when we woke up the first morning and made a complaint. They immediately responded to us by sending someone to check if there’s anything wrong with the aircon. In the end, they offered free upgrade to pool suite for us, which was amazing for our kids. Highly appreciated for their hospitality and all the help.

reviews.title: This is hard one to review.
reviews.text: I have stayed at Conrad many times, and in many countries, and I am not sure I will return to this one in Bali. It was a disappointment, but which was professionally managed by the supervisory staff. Five months before arriving on this trip, I was in constant communications with the staff and asked for a quiet room, as we were on a celebration trip and also I am sensitive to noise. Well, after many email exchanges of confirmations to give me a quiet room, they ended it up giving the loudest room on the stretch of Lagoon Access room. I was stunned that they were so negligent. I wrote to the manager a few hours after arrival and I have to say, they were extremely kind and apologetic, offered to move us to a bigger room, and provided other perks. We had traveled from Los Angeles, which was like a 25 hour flight, so didn't feel like packing and unpacking again, so we declined the move. So first, the management staff were very graceful in their handling of the mistake made by the receptionist and concierge. SUMANTARA was especially kind in handling the issue. Now, I must say the breakfast in the main dining hall is just awful: it felt like a fleamarket, very loud, and food very sup par. I also for a to-go coffee cup, and they didn't have one. In that gigantic hotel, and they could not provide a to-go coffee at breakfast! We then had breakfast at RIN on subsequent days, and that was very good. The gym needs a serious upgrade, it's really a disgrace to the Conrad name to have such an awful gym given how big the hotel is, and how expensive it is. I go to Bali for one month every May, and I am not sure I will return to the Conrad next year. Frankly, we stayed at cheaper hotels in Seminyak that had better service and attention. There are simply too many options in Bali to be dealing with blatant neglect.
reviews.response:
Dear Hung Cam Thai,
Thank you for having shared your honest impressions on your recent stay. While we aim for a flawless experience for each guest, sometimes we fall short, yet we are determined to do our best to resolve the individual requests for each of our guests. I sincerely apologize your recent stay did not entirely meet your expectations, including not having a to-go cup for coffee and our large breakfast buffet in Suku (which also offers a la carte choices to guests at the table) not meeting your expectations.
We hope to have the opportunity to win back your confidence on a future stay by further preparing your stay by including your personal requests in advance.
Thank you for reconsidering and hope to see you back next year!
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Family with toddler
reviews.text:
Great place to stay - made our stay special (we had a couple celebrations) arrange a cot with kid toiletries and the room was upkeep, clean and big for a toddler to run about.
Facilities was ok - no kids pool or outdoor playground.. food wise was great!
Drawback was our room was at the last building but oceanfront so abit of a walk with a toddler. 
But overall definitely a great stay! Will come again!
reviews.response:
Dear Nurhayatie,
Delighted you enjoyed your recent stay wiht us and appreciate you sharing your kind comments!  Glad you enjoyed our food and beverage offering in terms of range and quality.  We will note for your next stay to assign a room closer to the main resort area to assure easier access to kids facilities.
Many thanks and look forward to welcoming you back again!
Kevin

reviews.title: Stunning beachfront resort with huge pool
reviews.positives: We love this hotel. Lovely staff, spacious tropical gardens, huge pool, lovely rooms and beachfront location
reviews.negatives: Would like to see another dining option given the size of the resort. Activate the beachfront area with another bar/restaurant.

reviews.title: Service was super
reviews.text:
Conrad did not disappoint. Service was great, all the staff were super helpful and polite. We booked 2 day transport for 6 hours and Gusti was really accommodating and knowledgeable. The huge pool was really fun where we sat for hours as was the fully equipped gym. 

Pity that the distance of Nusa Dua is far from everything and the beach, sand and water was not very pleasant and dirty.  Still we had a great time!
reviews.response:
Dear Swee,
Thank you for having placed your confidence in our team at Conrad for your recent stay!  We are pleased to know your stay did not disappoint, from our team to the pools and the transportation team - excellent!  We are sorry our beach was not to your expectation - something we are working hard at twice daily to maintain in top condition.
We are glad you had a great time and indeed look forward to welcoming you back when you are next in Bali.
Best,
Kevin

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Excellent

reviews.title: Stunning resort
reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant resort  The staff were super friendly and accommodating to any request. The facilities are outstanding. Hotel and rooms were the cleanest I've ever seen. The grounds gardens were immaculate. The only downside was the buffet breakfast, was not enough western style food options. Room service was disappointing, only 5 options, all Asian inspired dishes. As far as location to eating outside the hotel, only two resturants within walking distance. Would definitely stay again but thoroughly source out dining options elsewhere in advance.
reviews.response:
Dear Nicole,
Thrilled to have welcomed you and family recently to Conrad and appreciate your kind comments on our team, hotel grounds and general cleanliness.
We are currently working on offering greater variety of food at breakfast and throughout our menu so all guests are made to feel comfortable.
Hope to welcome you back when you are next in Bali!
Best,
Kevin
